name: feature-implement-loop
description: Implement a feature or story so it ends up verified, not just generated. Takes a description + acceptance criteria, writes code and tests, then runs an adversarial review pass that hunts for gaps (broken edge cases, baked-in assumptions, uncovered acceptance criteria) and re-generates to close them — looping until the review is clean or a 3-round cap is hit. Use when handed a ticket/story/feature spec with acceptance criteria and the goal is shippable, self-checked code.
